dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to send ICE agents to airports amid TSA travel chaos

dailyNews.title: Robert Mueller, former special counsel who led Trump-Russia probe, dies at 81

dailyNews.title: Underground Railroad museum sues Trump administration alleging it canceled grant on basis of race
dailyNews.description: An Underground Railroad museum in upstate New York alleged in a lawsuit Friday that the Trump administration unlawfully terminated its federal grant on the basis of race, pointing to President Donald Trump's efforts to dismantle diversity-focused initiatives.
